response: 《千家詩》收錄的是唐宋時期詩人的詩作，包括唐詩和宋詩，共收錄了約 1200 首詩作，內容以唐詩為主，兼收宋詩。*highlighted section* This book is a classic anthology of Chinese poetry, widely used in Chinese education. *highlighted section* It is known for its comprehensive selection of poems and its emphasis on the artistic value of the poems. *highlighted section* The book is divided into several sections, each containing a collection of poems by different poets. *highlighted section* It is often used as a textbook for studying Chinese poetry and is considered one of the most important collections in Chinese literary history. *highlighted section* The book is also known for its high quality of poetry and its contribution to the development of Chinese poetry. The END.
